final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering approach are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout: top header zone (主标题 + 副标题 + 导语) / left structural exploded-view zone with 中文引线标注 and detail close-ups / upper-right materials & craftsmanship zone with texture swatches and annotations / mid-right pattern & color & cultural meaning zone with 主色板, 纹样样本, and cultural text / bottom dressing-sequence flowchart and 核心特征总结; central subject must be a full-body standing figure in authentic 少数民族服饰 if human presentation is appropriate
Subject: must include a carefully chosen representative 中国少数民族 costume as the central subject — select the most visually rich and structurally complex example autonomously; must include labeled key components, material texture swatches, pattern samples, color palette, and cultural annotations throughout
Scene/backdrop: must use a 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background with no decorative scenery
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, scholarly, archival atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, high-end 文博 palette anchored by the costume's authentic colors, with muted background tones — exact balance is yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric texture swatches (silk, embroidery, weave, etc.) rendered with material fidelity — exact rendering technique is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all in-image text in 简体中文 only — 主标题, 副标题, 导语, all 引线标注, 材质说明, 纹样寓意, 色彩含义, 穿着顺序流程, 核心特征总结; no English, no pinyin, no romanization, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve complete layout structure with all five zones visible and legible; all Chinese text must be clean, regular, and readable at infographic scale; central figure or object must be photorealistic / highly detailed illustration quality; structural exploded lines must be accurate to real garment construction
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio-portrait feel, e-commerce product-page feel, anime or cartoon style, cosplay feel, inaccurate structural labels, garbled or blurred text, fake or generic textures, over-decoration, English text, pinyin
